summary: Completed comprehensive testing of automated drone patrol scheduling feature with AI-optimized routes. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend patrol scheduling interface fully functional with AI route generation, waypoint display, and patrol control buttons.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console for Recharts components (existing issue)

passed_tests: POST /api/patrols/generate - Generates AI-optimized patrol with 6 waypoints and AI reasoning
GET /api/patrols - Returns list of patrol schedules correctly
Patrol Routes page loads with accurate stats (Total: 2, Active: 0, Drones on Patrol: 1, Efficiency: 90%)
Generate Patrol dialog opens and shows available drones with battery levels
Patrol generation creates waypoints with priority scores for 5 zones
Patrol card expands to show AI reasoning and route waypoints
Start/Pause patrol buttons work correctly with status updates
New patrol creation flow works end-to-end
Form validation and drone selection working properly
AI integration with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY working perfectly
All 34 backend API endpoints (100% success rate including new patrol APIs)
